text: Entering this space, I feel a sense of quiet curiosity. The world beyond the glass is open, modern, yet sterile—inviting thought and reflection. As I approach the exhibit, the bold patterns and the words 'Responsive and rapidly evolving' fill me with anticipation. Here, art, knowledge, and technology converge. I sense the invitation to explore the relationship between humans and intelligent machines. There is wonder in seeing ideas laid out and the promise of discovery if I lean into the experience. Surrounded by the thoughtful displays, I feel alive with questions about progress and coexistence.
